_meta.description: Canonical OIV domain registry · DNS-verified entries · Ley 21.663 Chile
_meta.format: rut → { domain, razon_social, sector, dns_verified, verified_at, _note? }
_meta.coverage_note: 100% ANCI universe catalogued (909/909). DNS-verified passive (dig +short A). ~99% of entries have verified domains; ~1% documented honest status (email-only · NXDOMAIN · individual contractor).
_meta.milestone: Full ANCI universe catalogued · honest per-entry verification status · 10/10 sectors closed
_meta.expansion_notes: v0.4.0 full universe · 644→995 entries (+351 infraestructura_digital) · 100% coverage · infraestructura_digital 65→416 (100% closed)
_meta.second_procedure_anticipated: Res 85 (abril 2026) · agua + combustibles + transporte · ~77 OIVs · en consulta pública

cleanup_log.action: remove 8 RUTs duplicados typo + fix universe_total 909→915
cleanup_log.reason: RUTs mal transcritos de empresas OIV reales · canonical RUT ya en dataset

cleanup_log.change: EMSSAT Coquimbo (91071000-7) reassigned from essat.cl → aguasdelvalle.com (live · 44.195.229.203, 52.200.66.12). Hard collision with EMSSAT Atacama (91065000-9) resolved.

Documented 59 duplicate domain groups in _meta.duplicate_audit with kind+rationale per group. Most reflect legitimate corporate-group / ministerial-pair / sector-cross structures; one (sap.cl) flagged unrelated-homonym pending domain discovery.
Full catalog re-verification with multi-resolver chain. Applied per-entry verification_status field. Live A-record: 794 · Mail-only MX: 30 · NXDOMAIN: 148. Net Layer-1 verified: 824 (~83.5%).
